---

## Overview

> Comprehensive SaaS for building and deploying custom AI agents.

**Infinallnextjs** is an advanced web application system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Vite, React, Next.js, TailwindCSS.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Browser Client"] -->|"HTTPS"| B["Next.js SSR + Tailwind + Vite HMR"];
    B -->|"Component Render"| C["Interactive UI Layer"];

    style A fill:#0f2027,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#203a43,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style C fill:#2c5364,stroke:#00e5ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Infinallnextjs/
  .npmrc
  LICENSE
  README.md
  index.html
  package.json
  src/
    App.tsx
    Attributions.md
    README_NEXTJS.md
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `TypeScript` |
| **Project Category** | `Web Application` |
| **Total Source Files** | `149` |
| **Frameworks** | `Vite`, `React`, `Next.js`, `TailwindCSS` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>@radix-ui/react-alert-dialog</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-collapsible</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-context-menu</code>  <code>@types/node</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-dialog</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-menubar</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-avatar</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-hover-card</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-navigation-menu</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-label</code>  <code>@jsr/supabase__supabase-js</code>  <code>@radix-ui/react-accordion</code>  <code>@vitejs/plugin-react-swc</code>
</p>
